description: Perplexity v3: empty string thread_url_slug test

details.err_http2_note: 208-byte template continues to work — no ERR_HTTP2_PROTOCOL_ERROR
details.stream_failed_error_message: PplxStreamError: [STREAM_FAILED_FIRST_CHUNK_ERROR] thread_url_slug is required on first message
details.stream_failed_note: Empty string slug is treated as 'not provided'. Perplexity client explicitly requires a non-empty thread_url_slug on the first SSE message.
details.private_answer_note: No '비공개 답변' dialog appeared. URL uses real UUID from Perplexity (d2ea98c8-...), not fake APF-generated UUID like in v2.
details.warning_note: No APF warning text visible. Page shows partial content '시고' but no structured warning message.
details.ui_behavior: 답변 tab visible with minimal content. Page rendered but answer area mostly empty due to stream failure.
details.network_summary: 202 requests total. JS/CSS chunk loading, Fetch API calls (free-queries, collections, accounts), WebSocket to suggest.perplexity.ai. No perplexity_ask EventStream request visible in current view.
details.console_errors: STREAM_FAILED_FIRST_CHUNK_ERROR with full stack trace through pplx-stream and platform-core modules

results.recommendation: Empty string slug does NOT work — Perplexity requires a valid non-empty thread_url_slug. Options: (1) Generate a real-looking slug (e.g. lowercase-words-format like 'security-policy-blocked'), (2) Omit thread_url_slug entirely and accept STREAM_FAILED error but find another way to display warning, (3) Intercept the Perplexity client's thread creation to get the real slug before injecting APF response.

summary.v3_empty_slug_result: FAILED — empty string treated as missing
summary.v2_comparison: v2 used fake UUID → caused 403 private answer dialog. v3 empty string → still causes STREAM_FAILED_FIRST_CHUNK_ERROR.
summary.208_byte_template: CONFIRMED WORKING — no ERR_HTTP2 in v2 or v3
summary.remaining_problem: thread_url_slug is the key blocker for clean Perplexity warning display. Need valid slug or alternative approach.
